docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, RANDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC. $481.24 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $576.24, DEFENDANT RECEIVED NOTICE OF 12/20/22 AND THAT ITS REQUEST FOR ARBITRATION WOULD BE DETERMINED THEN. DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR AND NO EVIDENCE RE: ARBITRATION WAS SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH RIGHT TO INSPECT PROVISION PRESENTED BY PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT NOT ENTITLED TO COLLECT $481.24 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT THE HEARING BY ZOOM (DEFENDENT)**GRANTED**
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2022 - JUDGMENT.

ORDER ON COURT REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER REQUESTED BY DEFENDANT-GET AROUND **DENIED**WITHOUT PREJUDICE. YOU MUST GO TO THE COURT HEARING SCHEDULED ON 12/20/22 @3:30PM IN DEPT. 506 IF YOU WOULD LIKE TO BE HEARD;
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT THE HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE:NATIONAL REGISTERED AGENTS INC.] FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, RANDY AS TO DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT FOR SERVICE:NATIONAL REGISTERED AGENTS INC.] SERVED NOV-03-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$65.00) SERVED NOV-14-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT THE HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $962.48 FILED BY LI, RANDY AS TO DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-20-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
(SC-105)REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER -COMPEL ARBITRATION OF THIS MATTER FILED BY DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC.
ANSWER RE: REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER & ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, RANDY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-20-2022 BY VISITING JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF RANDY LI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC.
